basic_details.job_title: TIFR Administrative Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Tata Institute of Fundamental Research (TIFR) Administrative Officer Notification 2026 has been released on the official website tifr.res.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the TIFR Administrative Officer Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 40 years Age Relaxation: As per rules

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate from a recognised University/Institute with an aggregate of 60% marks, Diploma/Degree/Certificate
qualification.details: Graduate from a recognised University/Institute with an aggregate of 60% marks. Diploma/Degree/Certificate course in Management or Administration from a recognised University/Institute. Proficiency in use of personal computers and applications. 5 years' service at Level 6 and /or Level 7 and /or Level 8 or with equivalent TME (total monthly emolument).

selection_process: Written Test Skill Test Personal Interview
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 13-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of TIFR to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the TIFR Administrative Officer (C) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the TIFR Administrative Officer (C) position is 13th June 2026. Ensure all details are accurate before the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Administrative Officer (C) post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Administrative Officer (C) post announced by the Tata Institute of Fundamental Research (TIFR) in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must be graduates with 60% marks from a recognized university, possess a diploma/degree/certificate in Management or Administration, and be proficient in computer applications. Additionally, 5 years of service at specific levels is required.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Administrative Officer (C) position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Administrative Officer (C) post is 40 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per government rules.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Administrative Officer (C) role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Administrative Officer (C) position will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 118110.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the TIFR Administrative Officer (C) recruitment includes a Written Test, followed by a Skill Test, and a Personal Interview.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, according to the official notification, there is no application fee required for General/OBC or SC/ST category candidates for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q8. In which city and state is this job located?
faq.answer: The job is located in Mumbai, Maharashtra, with the pincode 400005.

faq.question: Q9. What is the mode of application for the TIFR Administrative Officer (C) post?
faq.answer: Applications for the TIFR Administrative Officer (C) recruitment must be submitted through the online mode only.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: You can find the official notification PDF and the online application link in the "Important Links" section of this article. It is recommended to visit the official TIFR website as well.
